hooks.command: jq -re 'if .stop_hook_active then empty else {decision:"block", reason:"Before stopping, invoke the engineering-insights skill once. It appends a single dated entry to the correct INSIGHTS.md (root, server/, client/, reviewer-core/, or e2e/) for any non-obvious finding from this session — failure modes, library quirks, architectural decisions with non-obvious reasons, recurring errors and fixes, or unresolved open questions. Append-only; skip anything obvious from reading the code. Cover all four modules — if reviewer-core/ or e2e/ code was opened and something non-obvious noticed there, the entry goes into that module. If nothing non-obvious was uncovered, output a one-line note saying so and stop."} end'
